form.formComment: Three-year-old colt (Ready For Moni - Must Be Hot) making his debut. Finished third in a trial on April 2 at Northfield Park over 1609m. Respect any move in betting.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr7) over 1609m at this track beaten 45 m by Super Mind (2:01.30) in NW1PMCD on April 8 at $38.60. At his previous start 8th (Fr3) over 1609m at this track beaten 60 m by Don't Let Em Party (1:59.30) in NW1PMCD on February 17 at $48.20. Top-three finish is well within his grasp.

form.formComment: Solid performance when beaten by 1.5 m finishing second behind Bluebird Kazoom at this track over 1609m in a NW1PMCD on March 31 at $1.70. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5 m finishing third behind Vanellope at this track over 1609m in a NW2PMCD on April 8 at $35.20. Racing in great heart and is a leading contender.
